response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across multiple languages and domains, with clear experience in developer tooling, test automation, and CI/CD infrastructure — aligning well with the role’s technical focus. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives beyond workshop facilitation, and there’s no clear indication of mobile platform experience or formal managerial tenure matching the 2-year minimum.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, code generators, CI systems)
Proven track record in test automation and TDD practices across multiple projects
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops and talks
concerns: No clear evidence of 2+ years in formal people management or team leadership
Lack of demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android)
Roles listed as 'Senior Software Developer' without explicit people leadership responsibilities
